reviews.comment:
Es la "Única" Estación  de Servicio entre Quilino (Cba), La Rioja (LRJ), o Chumbicha (CTC) por Ruta Nac 60. Se trata una YPF que solo expende naftas y gasoil, también tiene Bar kiosco (estilo Full "pero no es UN FULL)...  La parada tiene baño con ducha, por ello Duermen los camiones. Esta a 110 km de La Rioja; 78 km de Chumbicha; y 100km de Catamarca, ESTRATEGICA PARADA. No tiene WIFI, es un problema y nadie te da bola.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only gas station between Quilino (Córdoba), La Rioja (La Rioja), and Chumbicha (Catamarca) on National Route 60. It's a YPF station that only sells gasoline and diesel, and it also has a convenience store (like a Full, but not a Full). The station has a bathroom with a shower, so trucks sleep there. It's 110 km from La Rioja, 78 km from Chumbicha, and 100 km from Catamarca—a strategic stop. There's no Wi-Fi, which is a problem, and nobody pays attention to you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLNzdURFdREAE
